sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59661" key="kraspedi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρασπεδίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n59661.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hindmost person in a chorus</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κορυφαῖος</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.678e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
